issue_title: Fix layout breaking on /projects page when screen width is reduced
issue_body_preview:
## Issue

- resolve: route06/liam-internal#5926

## Why is this change needed?

On the `/projects` page, when the screen width is reduced, layout elements break in several ways:
- Project titles wrap to multiple lines instead of truncating
- Repository badge names overflow their container
-
test_description_zh: 在 /projects 页面上，逐步缩小浏览器窗口宽度（或使用响应式调试工具模拟较小屏幕），观察页面中项目标题的显示方式以及仓库徽章名称是否保持在其容器内。
expected_result_zh: 当屏幕宽度缩小时，项目标题应以省略号（truncate）截断而非换行为多行显示；仓库徽章名称应保持在其容器边界内，不会溢出；页面整体布局不应出现错位或破碎现象。
